name: dictex-monorepo
description: DicTeX monorepo: consumer dictation app, DicTeX Lab tooling app, Python STT engine, shared TS packages

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/dictex && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/lab
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/dictex && npm run build --workspace apps/lab
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test apps/dictex/src/main/normalizationPolicy.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/overlayState.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/overlayPresenter.test.ts apps/dictex/src/renderer/src/overlayPreview.test.ts apps/dictex/src/renderer/src/hooks/useSttConfig.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/settings.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/sttWorkerClient.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/sttWorkerManager.test.ts apps/dictex/src/main/dictationFlow.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/candidateCatalog.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/datasetBuilder.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/promptVariants.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/benchmarkScoring.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/benchmarkExecution.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/normalizerBenchmark.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/benchmarkRunExportWriter.test.ts apps/lab/src/main/normalizerBenchmarkRunExportWriter.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/corpusCorrection.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/experimentProtocol.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/resultsSelection.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useSegmentAudio.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useCorpus.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useDatasetBuilder.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useBenchmarkRuns.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useCandidateSelection.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useDatasetExport.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useRulesMigration.test.ts apps/lab/src/renderer/src/hooks/useExperiments.test.ts packages/shared/src/commands.test.ts packages/shared/src/formatting.test.ts packages/shared/src/latex.test.ts packages/shared/src/styles.test.ts packages/shared/src/normalizer.test.ts packages/shared/src/normalizerRulesMigration.test.ts packages/shared/src/datasetExport.test.ts packages/shared/src/sttEngine.test.ts packages/shared/src/sttScoring.test.ts packages/shared/src/textDiff.test.ts packages/shared/src/localEvents.test.ts packages/shared/src/benchmarkRuns.test.ts packages/shared/src/benchmarkRunDetail.test.ts packages/shared/src/benchmarkContract.test.ts packages/shared/src/benchmarkRunExport.test.ts packages/shared/src/normalizerBenchmarkRunExport.test.ts
